login.mfaPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

draft.missing: Missing data: {{fields}} — shown as [INFORMATION REQUIRED] in the draft.
draft.finalNotice: This section is final and read-only.

versions.title: Version history
versions.empty: No versions yet — generate or save to create one.
versions.restored: Rolled back to the selected version.

validation.title: Validation Engine — Missing Info & Disclosure Gaps
validation.subtitle: Missing required fields, cross-document conflicts, and SEBI disclosure gaps.
validation.none: No flags. Run validation after entering data.
validation.consistencySubtitle: Cross-section contradictions, stale figures and placeholder residue across the assembled DRHP.
validation.noFindings: No findings yet. Run the check once sections have content.

security.title: Account security
security.subtitle: Multi-factor authentication (TOTP)
security.setupHint: Add the secret below to your authenticator app (or open the otpauth link), then confirm a code to enable.
security.disableHint: Enter a current code to disable MFA.
security.enabledOk: MFA enabled. You'll be asked for a code at sign-in.
